Function: __validdrive
Address: 0x45DF60


/* Library Function - Single Match
    __validdrive
   
   Library: Visual Studio 1998 Release */

int __cdecl __validdrive(uint param_1)

{
  UINT UVar1;
  char local_4 [4];
  
  if (param_1 == 0) {
    return 1;
  }
  local_4[1] = 0x3a;
  local_4[2] = 0x5c;
  local_4[3] = 0;
  local_4[0] = (char)param_1 + '@';
  UVar1 = GetDriveTypeA(local_4);
  if ((UVar1 != 0) && (UVar1 != 1)) {
    return 1;
  }
  return 0;
}
